scenes.narration: Bhai sun, ye Event Sourcing in Production ki ek mistake teri ₹45-65LPA ki Razorpay offer cancel kara dega.
Without understanding Event Sourcing in Production, systems fail at scale. Here's why it matters.
Think of Event Sourcing in Production like a traffic cop at a busy intersection — directing flow efficiently.
The core mechanism of Event Sourcing in Production: it distributes work, manages state, and handles failures gracefully.
Key properties of Event Sourcing in Production: fault tolerance, horizontal scalability, and low latency.
Real-world example: companies like Netflix and Uber use Event Sourcing in Production to serve millions of users daily.
Quick recap: Event Sourcing in Production solves scale. Remember: distribute, monitor, and failover. That's the pattern.
